items.title: Memorial services for Jesse Jackson begin at Chicago HQ of his civil rights group
items.description: Memorial services for the Rev. Jesse Jackson Sr. begin in Chicago and stretch across the country to honor his long civil rights legacy

items.title: DOJ says it's 'reviewing' whether Epstein reports were improperly withheld
items.description: The DOJ vowed to publish any documents that were "improperly" tagged.

items.title: WATCH:  Schoolkids' act of kindness goes viral
items.description: A fourth-grade class in Florida is showing what can happen when everyone gives a little bit of love to someone in need.

items.title: Hillary Clinton set to be deposed in House Oversight Committee's Epstein probe
items.description: Former first lady Hillary Clinton is scheduled to face lawmakers' questions over her and her husband's ties to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

items.title: WATCH:  Mamdani: No snowball fight ban after NYPD officers pelted with snow
items.description: A viral incident between New Yorkers and NYPD officers during Monday's blizzard has snowballed into Mayor Zohran Mamdani's first test with the police ...
